caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt is seated in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing store. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind him, the wall is covered in various framed photographs, and a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands nearby, next to a clothing rack. To the right of the screen, a logo reading "REALLY RED" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, though his position and the surrounding environment remain static. The background elements, including the photos and the mannequin, do not move, focusing the action entirely on the man's speaking delivery.
